endpoint.description: Wazuh Manager API URL (JWT auth), for example https://wazuh.example.com:55000. Required for ListAgents.

indexerEndpoint.description: Wazuh Indexer URL (OpenSearch), for example https://wazuh.example.com:9200. Required for ListAlerts/GetAlertSummary/ListVulnerabilities/GetVulnerabilitySummary.

headers.description: Optional extra HTTP headers sent to Wazuh API.

skipTlsVerify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for private Wazuh deployments.
